Shrink  

Description

1: Decrease Player Size by 34%

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 50 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 4 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: PC, Group Only Spell Type: Beneficial, Group Only
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel smaller.
Cast on other: Soandso shrinks.
Effect Fades: You return to normal height.

Game Description

Shrinks your target, allowing them greater mobility in tight quarters.

Triggered by spell

  • Getting Fortune

Items with this effect

  • Anizok's Minimizing Device
  • Bestial Sandals
  • Boots of Beast Mastery
  • Boots of the Beastlord
  • Cobalt Bracer
  • Earring of Diminutiveness
  • Humanoid Reductionizer
  • Ring of the Ancients
  • Savage Boots
  • Shimmering Bauble of Trickery
  • Spell: Shrink
  • Vial of Shrieker Essence
  • Wild Lord's Sandals

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Shrink
ClassLevel
BST23
SHM15
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (18)
  • Sold By (10)
  • Screenshots
Add Image

Post Comment
Introduction of /rewind command
QuoteReply
# May 31 2024 at 6:18 PM Rating: Excellent
Andhrimnir
Guru
251 posts
For anyone else who saw the 10+ year-old argument below and was curious: Darkpaw Games do not seem to have a public repository of patch notes that far back, but according to Allakhazam's archive, /rewind was introduced in the March 23, 2004 patch.

Patch notes (secondary source)
▲ Page top
Stuck!?!
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2004 at 7:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800118731
View User Forum
21 posts
A lot of players (especially the larger classes - trolls, ogres, barbs etc) have been getting stuck in the tents in Paludial Caverns. The only solutions are to camp out and back in, or cast this spell.
▲ Page top
RE: Stuck!?!
QuoteReply

__DEL__1609719499484
10 posts
Or, read the instrustins for the game, and use the /rewind command, works rather well

pvp
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2004 at 8:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1676852282727
34 posts
definately a pain when you're in tight quarters and you have tons of barbarians in the way. I especially like it in pvp. It makes it harder for people to see me, and if I'm on a short I can see him much better. =)
▲ Page top
RE: whats advantage?
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2003 at 12:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784015463
5 posts
It's rather useful in PvP as well, for obvious reasons.
▲ Page top
Question
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2003 at 12:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254869504
28 posts
And the difference between this spell and Diminution is.....?
▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2003 at 3:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763610128
39 posts
Diminution does the whole group - Shrink is for a single target within your present group.
▲ Page top
whats advantage?
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2003 at 5:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784681499
15 posts
▲ Page top
RE: whats advantage?
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2003 at 5:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784681499
15 posts
sorry entered before i got done. where is the advantage to being small the mobs still hit the same amout & just as hard,"since on the subject" where is the advantage to being large you get no extra damage added to your attacks. just curios?
▲ Page top
RE: whats advantage?
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2003 at 4:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783879081
287 posts
Untill you have been a Troll who is on the run and the only thing thats stopping you from getting killed and zoning is a door way. You wont beable to understand what its like to have a sore forhead.
▲ Page top
Horses
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2003 at 2:14 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
People with horses beg for shrink because when they are gnome-sized the horse's head doesn't get in the way.
▲ Page top
RE: whats advantage?
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2003 at 11:43 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758423492
View User Forum
Sage
308 posts
When raiding in places like The Hole, Plane of Hate, Plane of Innovation, it makes it much easier for everyone to move around if everyone is double-shrunk (about 1/3-1/2 normal size). Now you can fit 2x-3x as many people around the mobs to kill them faster, plus everyone is less likely to be stepping all over each other.

On smaller mobs, this will increase your DPS as more melee are able to "reach" the mob. Or, you can look at it as the melee will spend less time running around trying to get close enough to reach the mob (even on larger mobs with a larger melee radius).

Generally, you won't want to shrink the MA, SA, enchanters, or any line of sight casters (wizards and mages using bolt spells, rangers using their bows). Everyone else should be shrunk as tiny as possible (beastlords and shaman can do the honors).
▲ Page top
RE: whats advantage?
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2003 at 3:05 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591784586706
15 posts
Usually Shrink is for raids; you cast it on the larger people so the area is less congested. You can also use it to help people get to places where they normally couldn't (ie, shrink an ogre so he can get through a small doorway).
▲ Page top
